testsuite.name: P2-3: rate limit — checkRateLimit unit tests

testcase.name: request within limit: passes through
testcase.classname: P2-3: rate limit — checkRateLimit unit tests

testcase.name: request exceeding /run limit: returns allowed:false with retryAfter
testcase.classname: P2-3: rate limit — checkRateLimit unit tests

testcase.name: non-run endpoint has 5x higher limit (default 300 vs 60)
testcase.classname: P2-3: rate limit — checkRateLimit unit tests

testcase.name: different IPs have independent counters
testcase.classname: P2-3: rate limit — checkRateLimit unit tests

testcase.name: ORAGER_RATE_LIMIT_RPM env var is respected
testcase.classname: P2-3: rate limit — checkRateLimit unit tests

testcase.name: counter resets after the window expires
testcase.classname: P2-3: rate limit — checkRateLimit unit tests

testcase.name: first requests within limit pass through (HTTP 200)
request exceeding limit returns 429 with Retry-After header
